headline: Reflecting On Custody Bank Stocks’ Q4 Earnings: Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN)
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the custody bank stocks, including Franklin Resources (NYSE:BEN) and its peers.
